use_cases: Displaying client testimonials in an auto-rotating or user-controlled carousel format
Showcasing team member profiles with social media links for credibility
Building trust through social proof on landing pages or portfolio sections
Featuring professional endorsements on business or product marketing sites
Presenting rotating success stories with smooth animated transitions
ai_summary: A profile card testimonial carousel component that displays professional testimonials in a sliding card format with smooth Framer Motion animations. Each card features a profile image, name, title, description, and social media links. Navigation is handled via ChevronLeft/ChevronRight buttons with AnimatePresence for seamless transitions. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, portfolio sections, and product marketing sites to build credibility through rotating client endorsements.
